badge_full_footer: The intention, ideas and structure are human, AI assisted with wording or formatting
bloc_signature:
Declaration: [TCP/UP: HCE] (Human-Centric Editing)
> Substance: human | Form: AI-assisted
> The intention, ideas and structure are human, AI assisted with wording or formatting
sidebar_download_call: Need a Black & White variant or specific format?
sidebar_disclaimer: TCP/UP is a declarative protocol. The displayed label corresponds to the author's self-declaration about their creation process
philosophy_quote: "AI is my craftsperson. It shapes the raw material I provide to give it its final form."
definition_text: This content is based on intellectual substance of human origin. AI intervened to assist with wording, rewording, tone adaptation, or formatting, without being at the origin of the substance
usecase_text: Office productivity, format transformation, corporate communication, articles, blog posts, reports, complex professional emails, LinkedIn posts, etc.
example1_text: Transform 15 minutes of messy meeting notes into a structured report (Action/Decision/Info).
example2_text: Transform a slightly dry internal email into a diplomatic and professional message for a client.
example3_text: Take a complex technical text and ask AI to simplify it for an audience of non-experts.
example4_text: Transform a blog article you wrote into a dynamic script for a YouTube video.
edgecase1_title: "I used AI to translate, then I reviewed it. Is it HCE?"
edgecase1_text: Yes, if you verified the translation's faithfulness without completely rewriting it.
edgecase2_title: "I dictated my ideas to AI which put them in shape. Is it HCE?"
edgecase2_text: Yes, that's the essence of HCE: human intention, assisted execution.
edgecase3_title: "AI suggested a better structure. I accepted it. Is it HCE?"
edgecase3_text: No, move to ACE. AI contributed to the substance (structure).
edgecases_more_info: More details on critical cases and arbitration here
prompt1_text: "Here are my hastily written meeting notes: [Notes]. Transform them into a clean report with a summary of decisions, a list of actions to take, and a structure by key points"
prompt2_text: "Rephrase this email to make it warmer and more empathetic, while keeping the following factual information: [Details]"
prompt3_text: "Based on this detailed outline I wrote [insert outline], write a fluent introduction and structured development while keeping exactly the order of my arguments."
prompt4_text: "Here are a series of transcribed voice messages [text]. Reorganize them into a coherent blog article, with an introduction and conclusion, without adding new ideas."
